backtest_kalshi.description: Kalshi vectorized backtesting harness — synthetic mode from prior_validation records + proof packs

multi_model_debate.description: 3-role adversarial debate: Forecaster (Grok), Critic (Gemini native API), Synthesizer (local). Weighted average with consensus/disagreement flag. Opt-in via DEBATE_MODE=true
notes: 2026-04-09: Gemini 2.5 Flash replaces dead GLM as primary critic. Uses native google.generativeai API (OpenAI compat truncates). Cascade: Gemini → GLM (dead) → Grok adversarial. Debate example: Grok 0.75 vs Gemini 0.45, critique_strength=0.85, consensus=disagree

changes: AI bulk tier: ai_max_priors default 50 → 10 (bulk=0, premium-only)
ai_provider_config.description: AI provider configuration fixes — GLM URL, model, Grok timeout, premium-only tier
